name: Landbot Chatbot API
what_it_does: No-code chatbot builder with REST API for web, WhatsApp, and Messenger — enabling teams to create conversational forms, lead capture flows, and customer support bots without coding, with API for bot management and data integration.
use_cases: Creating and publishing chatbot flows programmatically via API for automated deployment
Retrieving conversation data and lead captures from Landbot bots for CRM integration
Triggering WhatsApp message templates to contacts via Landbot's WhatsApp API
Managing contacts and conversation variables via REST API for personalization
Webhook integration for routing conversation events to external systems in real-time
not_for: Complex enterprise chatbot with NLP and intent recognition (use Dialogflow or Kore.ai)
High-volume transactional messaging without visual conversation design
Teams needing fully custom chatbot logic without no-code constraints
best_when: A marketing or growth team needs no-code WhatsApp and web chatbots for lead generation, with API access to pull conversation data and trigger messages.
avoid_when: You need complex NLP, enterprise conversation orchestration, or programmatic bot creation from scratch.

auth.notes: API token from account dashboard. Authorization header with token. Account-scoped access. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes. Single token per account.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from €30/month; Professional from €80/month; Business from €300/month
pricing.notes: Free tier available for web chatbots. API access on Professional plan and above. Spanish company (Barcelona). Strong WhatsApp Business API integration. Visual builder-first approach. Used by marketing teams for lead generation.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; not detailed publicly

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for bot management, contacts, and WhatsApp messaging. Webhook for conversation events. Limited API surface — primarily for data extraction and WhatsApp template messaging. Cannot create complex bot flows via API — visual builder required.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact creation idempotent by phone/email. Message sends create new messages — not idempotent. Bot configuration reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires Professional plan or above — not free tier
Bot flows must be created visually — cannot create complex bots via API
WhatsApp template messages require Meta approval — 24-hour window limitation
EU data residency — relevant for US/non-EU data compliance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Spanish/EU company. EU data residency. API token auth. WhatsApp data through Meta infrastructure. No formal certifications beyond GDPR. Webhook secret for event verification.
